name: Tax-Exempt Distilled Spirits for Vinegar Production

eligibility.description: Vinegar manufacturers using the vaporizing process who establish a plant specifically for this purpose.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the production of distilled spirits (up to 15% ABV) exclusively for use in manufacturing vinegar on-site without the standard distilled spirits tax liability.
